note: Use MFA 09.200 / Menkaure-Hathor-Hare nome triad as the source anchor. Headpiece alignment, Hathor iconography, and animated pose must remain visibly marked as reconstructed until reviewed.
The source anchor is a seated/colossal Menkaure statue context (MFA 09.204). Any standing avatar derived from it is speculative and must not be presented as the original object form.

Ranefer/Ranofer statue references point to Saqqara and the Egyptian Museum in Cairo rather than Giza. Keep him as a comparative Old Kingdom sculpture guide unless a Giza-specific rationale is documented.
